narrative:
Akron 1-A (precinct in Summit County) has 937 registered voters, with 49.4% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 24.5% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 26.0%, a narrow Democratic lean of 1.5 percentage points.
